S

saveData(int, int, int) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.GameModel
Saves the current game state to GameData for use across scenes.
saveData(int, int, int) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.GameModelAdapter
Saves the current game state for use across scenes.
saveData(int, int, int) - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.IGameModel
Saves the current game state for use across scenes.
screen() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Displays the first random word on screen and updates the level label.
seconds - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Remaining seconds on the current timer.
seconds - Static variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.utilities.GameData
The remaining seconds on the timer when the game ended.
showMessage(boolean) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Displays a popup feedback message for 1 second.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.Main
JavaFX entry point called after the runtime is initialized.
START_VIEW - Static variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.PauseController
 
StartController - Class in com.example.escriturarapida.controller
Controller for the start screen of the application.
StartController() - Constructor for class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.StartController
 
startTimer() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Starts or restarts the countdown timer for the current level.
STYLES_PATH - Static variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.view.GameView
Path to the global stylesheet applied to all scenes.
